mapper.insert: INSERT INTO config_distribute_record (project_id, config_file_id, operator_id, target_node_ids, distribute_type, content_hash, restart_after, status, result_detail, create_time) VALUES (#{projectId}, #{configFileId}, #{operatorId}, #{targetNodeIds}, #{distributeType}, #{contentHash}, #{restartAfter}, #{status}, #{resultDetail}, #{createTime})
